# AgentPlane

> Open-source infrastructure for teams running AI agents in production: replayable observability (Chronicle) and token governance (TokenOps). Built by Susheem Koul and Tisha Chawla.

## Start here

- [Home](https://theagentplane.github.io/): Latest video, projects, and media from the AgentPlane team
- [Projects](https://theagentplane.github.io/projects.html): Chronicle and TokenOps: quick starts, repos, and tags
- [Media](https://theagentplane.github.io/media.html): Writing, talks, and videos on agent infrastructure
- [About](https://theagentplane.github.io/about.html): Team, mission, and contact via LinkedIn

## Open source

- [Chronicle on GitHub](https://github.com/theagentplane/chronicle): Record-and-replay for agent decision graphs — Envelopes, cut-point replay
- [Chronicle on PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/agent-chronicle/): `pip install agent-chronicle`
- [TokenOps on GitHub](https://github.com/theagentplane/tokenops): Run-aware token governance control plane + SDK — shared ledger, in-path policies
- [TokenOps on PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/agent-tokenops/): `pip install agent-tokenops`
- [AgentPlane org on GitHub](https://github.com/theagentplane): All repositories and issues

## Featured media

- [Your Agent Failed in Prod (video)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Lc8zRh9muoY): Record-and-replay for autonomous agents: Chronicle walkthrough
- [Your Agent Failed in Prod (article)](https://dev.to/tisha/your-agent-failed-in-prod-good-luck-reproducing-it-56ci): Why replayability beats bitwise determinism
- [Why Agents Forget](https://dev.to/tisha/why-agents-forget-5b46): How memory works in AI agents and what it takes to make them learn
- [From Validating Code to Evaluating Behavior](https://susheemk.substack.com/p/from-validating-code-to-evaluating): Rethinking testing for agentic systems

## Optional

- [Spec-Driven Development: When Structure Helps](https://dev.to/tisha/spec-driven-development-when-structure-helps-and-when-it-becomes-tax-1f66): SDD taxonomy and token economics for coding agents
- [Beyond Prompt Caching](https://susheemk.substack.com/p/beyond-prompt-caching-architecting): Codebase perception and retrieval for coding agents
- [Prompt Caching and Context Optimization](https://susheemk.substack.com/p/prompt-caching-and-context-optimization): KV cache reuse and prefix stability in agent workflows
